title: History Read Model Read Only Projection Semantic Contract
description: Source-backed draft semantic contract for the history read model read only projection capability, recovered from historical source-lineage evidence as lineage. Facets cite verified source-import manifest rows; proof is hermetic/runtime lineage, not fresh USF proof.
aiGuidance: Source-backed draft. Facet descriptions are concise source-backed summaries citing verified manifest rows; proof is hermetic/stale, not current readiness. Enrich facet detail and publish fresh proof before generation; respect the hexagonal constraint in ADR 0005.

lifecycle.description: Provides a read-only projection of tenant and admin history assembled from audit and related sources, exposed through tenant-history and admin-tenant-history reads; it is strictly a query surface and performs no mutation. Entries are projected from underlying records into a safe summarised shape on read. The projection deliberately excludes sensitive raw material so history can be browsed without exposing secrets.

stateModel.description: Each history entry carries an identifier, source, type, title, occurrence time, and a safe actor/status summary, returned with total, limit, and offset for paging; it deliberately excludes raw metadata, payloads, tokens, and secrets. The model is a projection over existing audit and event records rather than an owned canonical table, served through a history repository port. Paging fields make the read-only result set bounded and navigable.

permissions.description: Reads are tenant-scoped so a tenant sees only its own history, while the admin variant is operator-scoped to read a named tenant's history under privileged access; both preserve tenant isolation. Because the projection omits payloads, tokens, and secrets, even authorised readers cannot extract sensitive material through history. Access flows through ports and adapters, never a direct client database connection.

contracts.description: The contract is two read operations (tenant history and admin tenant history) returning the paged, summarised projection shape with no write side. The repository port defines the query and paging contract, and the projection guarantees the exclusion of raw payloads and secrets as a contract obligation. As a read-only surface it participates in backup/export/retention semantics only as a consumer of the underlying records.

validation.description: Paging inputs (limit, offset) are validated and bounded, and the projection enforces the safe-shape contract by emitting only the allowed summary fields. Tenant context is required so the read is correctly scoped. Missing or invalid configuration fails closed rather than returning an unscoped result.

errorModel.description: Because it is read-only there is no mutation to roll back; failures return a typed degraded or readiness error rather than a partial or fabricated result, and the read fails closed when tenant context or the substrate is unavailable. Provider failure keeps boundaries closed and does not invent history entries. Tenant data cannot be exposed across tenants.

auditModel.description: The capability is itself a window onto the audit/history record set, presenting a safe summarised view; reads preserve tenant context through spans and typed logs carry the tenant/organisation identifier when tenant-scoped. It never writes, so it adds no mutation audit of its own beyond the access trail. The underlying audit records it projects remain the canonical evidence.

readinessModel.description: Readiness depends on the underlying audit/history store being reachable; the capability degrades explicitly when that substrate is unavailable, keeping read-only readiness and audit visible (it has no mutation path to disable). Readiness being blocked, a failed history proof during promotion, or a missing isolation or audit signal raise alerts and block promotion.

proof.description: Behaviour is exercised by the history proof against the history repository projection, asserting the safe summarised shape and tenant scoping. Proof is hermetic/runtime lineage; fresh USF proof pending USF-101/USF-59.

uiSemanticDefinition.description: No verified UI source path in the manifest yet; author the UI semantic model before generation.
